Slender Man (2018)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $30,564,825Details
International Box Office $21,381,124
Worldwide Box Office $51,945,949
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,116,845
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $635,769
Total $1,752,614
Further financial details...

Synopsis

In a small town in Massachusetts, a group of friends perform a ritual in an attempt to debunk the lore of SLENDER MAN. When one of them goes mysteriously missing, they begin to suspect that she is, in fact, HIS latest victim.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$11,371,866 (37.2% of total gross)
Legs:2.69 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:58.8% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$10,000,000 (worldwide box office is 5.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:2,358 opening theaters/2,358 max. theaters, 4.3 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $40,126,817

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 10th, 2018 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: May 18th, 2018 (Wide) (Mexico)
August 9th, 2018 (Wide) (Curacao)
August 9th, 2018 (Wide) (Aruba)
August 10th, 2018 (Wide) (Indonesia)
August 10th, 2018 (Wide) (Sweden)
Video Release: October 30th, 2018 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for disturbing images, sequences of terror, thematic elements and language including some crude sexual references.
(Rating bulletin 2536 (Cert #51434), 7/18/2018)
Running Time: 93 minutes
Geographical setting: Massachusetts
Plot point: Demons, Hallucinations, Internet, Mind Control, Missing Child
Social setting: Mental Hospital, Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Source:Based on Folk Tale/Legend/Fairytale
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Mythology Entertainment, Madhouse Entertainment, Screen Gems
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
